Kathak Classes in Nirman Nagar, Jaipur

Address: 872 Gautam Marg, Rani Sati Nagar, Nirman Nagar, Jaipur

Enquire on WhatsApp Call +91 7976014592 Get directions

Serving west Jaipur — Nirman Nagar, Rani Sati Nagar, Shyam Nagar and around — this branch offers Kathak three evenings a week with founder Vartika Tiwari herself. The batch timing (5–6 PM) is planned so school-going children can attend comfortably after classes.

New students can begin any month; training follows the same structured exam path as every Fankaar branch.

Class timings

CourseDaysTime
Kathak Tue · Thu · Sat 5:00 – 6:00 PM

Timings can shift with the academic calendar — confirm the current batch on WhatsApp before your first visit.

Courses at this branch

  • Kathak 6 – 70+ · Online + Offline

Faculty

  • Vartika Tiwari — Founder & Director · Kathak
Studio photos coming soon

Join the Nirman Nagar branch

Message us — we'll confirm the current batch, fee and start date the same day.
